channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine Unleashes One of Its Heaviest Drone Bombardments, as Russia Strikes Ukraine
item.description: Ukraine launched a major nighttime attack on a dozen Russian regions, Russian-held Crimea, and surrounding seas, while Russia struck various regions.

item.title: Palestinians Grieve for a Father-to-Be Shot by Israeli Troops the Day His Son Was Born
item.description: Nayef Samaro, 25, was killed in an Israeli military raid on Nablus in the occupied West Bank as he prepared to meet his wife at the hospital for the birth.

item.title: Aircraft collides with Beijing's tallest building, causing damage
item.description: The cause of the damage could not be independently confirmed, and officials did not immediately comment on the incident.

item.title: U.S. promises substantial earthquake aid to Venezuela
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated: "We have a whole-of-government response. It will be large, fast, and effective."
